claim_short: 2409.05744 No-dimensional Helly's theorem in uniformly convex Banach spaces asks whether there is a no-dimensional Helly theorem and dual Maurey's lemma in Banach spaces of cotype q >= 2. Later arXiv:2603.22743 On Banach Spaces with the Helly Approximation Property proves that a Banach space has the Helly approximation property iff its dual, equivalently the space itself, has non-trivial Rademacher type, with a...
notes: registry_status=literature_implied_answer (cotype-only negative via Helly approximation characterization)
packet_title: Literature-Implied Answer: Cotype Alone Does Not Give Helly Approximation
source_question: Source paper: G. Ivanov, *No-dimensional Helly's theorem in uniformly convex Banach spaces*, arXiv:2409.05744. Location: Introduction, the displayed Open problem immediately before Section 2. Question: whether there is a version of the no-dimensional Helly theorem, and a corresponding dual Maurey's lemma, in Banach spaces of cotype q >= 2.
source_title: No-dimensional Helly's theorem in uniformly convex Banach spaces
